name: opencode-copilot-replacement
description: Replace GitHub Copilot inline completions with OpenCode-powered completions in VS Code.

opencodeVscode.enabled.description: Enable OpenCode inline completions and workspace-level Copilot completion replacement.

opencodeVscode.serverUrl.description: OpenCode server URL. Leave empty to use http://127.0.0.1:4096 and start `opencode serve` when needed.

opencodeVscode.opencodePath.description: Path to the OpenCode CLI used to start a local server.

opencodeVscode.serverUsername.description: Username for OpenCode server basic authentication when OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD is configured.

opencodeVscode.serverPassword.description: Password for OpenCode server basic authentication. Prefer OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD when possible.

opencodeVscode.sessionScope.description: Scope for reading OpenCode sessions. Current implementation only reads sessions for the active workspace.

opencodeVscode.completion.maxLatencyMs.description: Maximum time to wait for an OpenCode inline completion.

opencodeVscode.completion.contextLines.description: Number of lines around the cursor to send to OpenCode.

opencodeVscode.completion.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay before requesting inline completions.

opencodeVscode.disableCopilotOnActivatio.description: Disable GitHub Copilot inline completions at workspace scope when this extension activates.
